ProductName: 106/ Saxo Front Suspension Kit (+150mm track width)
ShortDescription:
CONTACT US TO BUY THIS

Our front suspension kit is a fully spherical jointed setup with strengthening added where needed. It uses modified 307 hubs that will be refurbished along with new bearings. The 307 hubs supplied use
FullDescription:
CONTACT US TO BUY THIS

Our front suspension kit is a fully spherical jointed setup with strengthening added where needed. It uses modified 307 hubs that will be refurbished along with new bearings. The 307 hubs supplied use BE sized drive flanges so the appropriate drive shafts will have to be sourced.
The kit replaces the OEM 106/Saxo strut with a coilover type strut with improved bump travel. The top mounts are mounted higher to gain suspension travel and the hubs have revised roll centre (three roll centre heights to suit application). Camber is adjustable via an eccentric camber washer, and via the inner joint on the TCA. Caster is adjustable via the compression strut.

The kit has the option of extra floor strengthening around the compression strut. Recommended for rally cars with big impacts in mind.

This is the +150mm kit (+75mm per side)

What you get:
Both wishbones with joints
Compression struts with joints
Wide washers (lower joint fail-safe)
Compression strut floor clevis
Strut bodies with eccentric camber adjustment
307 hubs with new bearings
Lower ball joint adapters
Spring platforms and locking collars
Spring top caps
2 custom C-spanners
Top mounts with bearing and sleeve nuts
Strut top stiffeners with strut brace brackets
Upper strut brace
Lower strut brace
Inner wing stiffening tubes and swagged gusset webs
CDS track rods with inner (106 S1 only) and outer spherical joints and spacers for bump steer correction
Strengthening plates to go the nut side of the rear clevis (footwell)
All required spacers, fixtures fittings and bolts

This kit has been designed with Race/Rally in mind.
This kit accepts 40 or 45mm inverted dampers, contact us to make a purchase and we will advise/supply springs and shock absorbers.
SHOCK ABSORBERS AND SPRINGS ARE NOT INCLUDED, BUT CAN BE SUPPLIED AT EXTRA COST.
Please note, there is no provision to run the front ARB with this set-up.

ShortDescription:
THIS KIT IS MADE TO ORDER, PLEASE ALLOW 4-6 WEEKS FOR MANUFACTURE

The 106/Saxo rear suspension kit has been designed to bring the damper ratio back to 1:1 with the wheel rate, without the need for fabricating turrets.
FullDescription:
THIS KIT IS MADE TO ORDER, PLEASE ALLOW 4-6 WEEKS FOR MANUFACTURE

The 106/Saxo rear suspension kit has been designed to bring the damper ratio back to 1:1 with the wheel rate, without the need for fabricating turrets.  This allows the use of a much softer damper which is less likely to overheat.

The kit allows a massive array of aftermarket shock absorbers and spring rates with easy adjustments to ride height and droop.

We recommend retaining base model torsion bars to ensure the trailing arms are secured in place.

STUB SPACERS, BEAM, AND TRAILING ARMS ARE NOT INCLUDED.

Shocks/springs are listed as optional extras.

ShortDescription:
A fully spherical jointed front suspension kit to fit the 205, with revised roll-centre and bump steer correction.

This kit has a strengthened and refurbished subframe along with re-positioned rear compression strut clevises to aid strength.
FullDescription:
A fully spherical jointed front suspension kit to fit the 205, with revised roll-centre and bump steer correction.

This kit has a strengthened and refurbished subframe along with re-positioned rear compression strut clevises to aid strength. The wishbones are fabricated from CDS tube and are designed with race and rally in mind.

We use refurbished 307 hubs along with new bearings, so does require our 40mm inverted type strut bodies to suit the 307 two bolt hub. This allows us to run a narrower track, and has the advantage of allowing camber adjustment on the strut body.

Supplied with screw on rose jointed track rod ends.

Caster and camber is adjustable.

THE FRONT SUBFRAME IS SUPPLIED ON AN EXCHANGE BASIS, or a surcharge will apply.

Please note, there is no provision to run the front ARB with this set-up.

ProductName: Peugeot/Citroen Motorsport Spec bullet tipped screw in stud conversion kit with steel nuts
ShortDescription: This is a complete set of 16 M12x1.25mm studs and 16 M12x1.25mm 60 degree taper steel nuts complete with a small tube of studlock for locking the studs into the hub. The nuts have an open head and a 19mm hexagon. (Peugeot flat bright zinc nuts als
FullDescription:
This is a complete set of 16 M12x1.25mm studs and 16 M12x1.25mm 60 degree taper steel nuts complete with a small tube of studlock for locking the studs into the hub. The nuts have an open head and a 19mm hexagon. (Peugeot flat bright zinc nuts also available.)

Although many cheaper studs on the market look similar to these, we source these studs from the UK and these are made in Europe so you can be assured of a top quality product.

These studs screw in place of your original wheel bolts and make locating the wheel on the hub much easier and faster, great for quick pit stops!

These studs are hardened and tempered to strength class 10.9 or 10 according to DIN/ISO standard 898. Final inspections are not restricted to random quality checks. Every single fastener is tested to ensure compliance with specifications. Studs/nuts are also offered individually and should be replaced after every race season.

Competition Wheel Stud Kit Features:

– 10.9 Grade Strength Class for ultimate strength and safety
– Bullet Tip prevents cross-threading when fitting nuts
– Faster and easier wheel changes
– Black zinc coating for additional strength and corrosion/wear resistance.

Choice of length –

– 68mm length: 12mm internal thread – 7mm plain shank – 36mm outer thread – 13mm bullet tip. Suitable for standard wheels
– 82mm length: 12mm internal thread – 7mm plain shank – 50mm outer thread – 13mm bullet tip.

– 90mm length: 12mm internal thread – 7mm plain shank – 58mm outer thread – 13mm bullet

Our new Peugeot 106/Citroen Saxo TU/BE4R mount kit that keeps the engine in the OE position, and critically, the new short intermediate shaft now enables us to ensure the engine and gearbox are square and level in the engine bay.

This offers
FullDescription:
Our new Peugeot 106/Citroen Saxo TU/BE4R mount kit that keeps the engine in the OE position, and critically, the new short intermediate shaft now enables us to ensure the engine and gearbox are square and level in the engine bay.

This offers some significant benefits when carrying out the BE4R gearbox conversion in the 106 and Saxo –

– Moves the inner CV cup away from the chassis rail for clearance gains.
– Allows more even driveshaft lengths across both side of the car.
– Gives less movement on the inner CV with improved CV angles, allowing more droop travel.
– No welding required.
– Retains the OE engine position and angle.
-Can be used with the OE top mount, or alternatively our billet mount as an optional extra for the Saxo/ph2 106.

Includes –
Poly bushed pin type top gearbox mount.
Poly bushed rear gearbox bracket/mount.
Additional 4th poly bushed rear mount integrated into the intermediate bearing carrier.
Billet alloy intermediate bearing carrier, with a natural hard anodised finish, supplied with hockey stick type bearing retainer bolts.
60mm shorter intermediate shaft.
Satchell competition specification driveshaft bar, available in any length required – standard track through to full Maxi width.
Larger/stronger 406/306 type BE outer joints (rather than the smaller 205 option). For use with our BE drive flanges for MA hubs, or any of our full suspension kits.

FullDescription:

ShortDescription:
Gripper Multi-Plate Race Spec Differential to suit BE1, BE3 and BE4 gearboxes.

 

The Gripper Limited Slip Differential uses a multi-plate design which, when it detects a difference in wheels speed across the driven axle, locks the
FullDescription:
Gripper Multi-Plate Race Spec Differential to suit BE1, BE3 and BE4 gearboxes.

 

The Gripper Limited Slip Differential uses a multi-plate design which, when it detects a difference in wheels speed across the driven axle, locks the driveshafts together increasing traction. This increase in traction equates to faster launches and increased corner exit speeds as the wheels are no longer spinning as they would with an open diff. Torque is equalised across the driven wheels sending drive torque to both whereas an open diff will send the torque to the spinning wheel wasting drive in tyre smoke! Understeer and oversteer characteristics are controlled and your car laps faster as a result.

This differential is available with several options of setup:

 

A – Tarmac racing – 40/65 Ramp angles with a 120NM Pre-Load
B – Road/trackday use – 40/65 Ramp angles with a 60NM Pre-Load
C – Gravel Rallying – 30/60 Ramp angles with a 120NM Pre-Load
D – Gravel Ralying – 30/60 Ramp angles with a 60NM Pre-Load
E – Old ZF Race Spec – 45/45 Ramp angles with a 120NM Pre-Load
F – Old ZF Road Spec – 45/45 Ramp angles with a 60NM Pre-Load
G – Race Soft Locking /lightweight – 50/80 Ramp angles with a 120NM Pre-Load
H – Road Soft Locking /lightweight – 50/80 Ramp angles with a 60NM Pre-Load
J – Race use (open on over-run) – 30/80 Ramp angles with a 120NM Pre-Load
K – Road use (less plates) – 30/80 Ramp angles with a 60NM Pre-Load

 

Gripper Lifetime Warranty / Guarantee

 

For customers peace of mind, all Gripper Diffs are covered by a lifetime warranty / guarantee against poor workmanship and inferior materials. Cases, lids and gears are made of aero quality steel and are built to tight tolerances which make them one of the most reliable and sought after transmission products on the market. Plates have minute machined oil grooves designed to allow a microscopic layer of oil to be pumped between them to smooth out and speed up lock / unlock which has the added benefit of significantly increasing the service life. Preload and locking action is maintained for much longer and the cost of ownership of a Gripper diff is lower compared to other multi plate limited slip diff designs.

FullDescription:
This kit was deigned to allow you to fit a BE4R gearbox to your 106/Saxo in place of the standard MA gearbox. The kit moves the engine across the bay by 20mm to improve weight distribution, and allows a longer off side outer driveshaft to be used.

This kit re-locates engine to the nearside by 20mm. In doing this you do not need to modify the offside chassis left for CV clearance, it gains access to the cam belt and most importantly it helps weight distribution.

The kit adds a fourth engine mount as the standard “torque link” that goes to the tunnel is notably week.

Includes a CNC billet alloy top engine mount repositioned by 20mm.

Please note the top engine mount mount has a four bolt fitment, and will not fit engines with the three bolt design.

This kit is aimed at full competition cars to give better weight distribution, and does require cutting and welding on the near side chassis leg for fitment.

ShortDescription:
Satchell Engineering ITB kit for the Peugeot TU5 J4/JP4 engine.

Using a CNC machined billet inlet to Satchell Engineering/Sandy Brown Race Engines design.

The kits uses Jenvey TH 42mm butterfly bodies, which are effective for engines o
FullDescription:
Satchell Engineering ITB kit for the Peugeot TU5 J4/JP4 engine.

Using a CNC machined billet inlet to Satchell Engineering/Sandy Brown Race Engines design.

The kits uses Jenvey TH 42mm butterfly bodies, which are effective for engines of around 150-220bhp, however the manifold walls have been produced with enough thickness to port out to suit bigger bodies when required. The bodies are located with dowels to ensure accurate spindle alignment, and the port end has o-ring seals, which are supplied and enable fuss free fitting and removal.

Easy to install, and designed to use as many OEM parts as possible, the kit uses the standard TU5J4 fuel rail, standard injectors as near to original location, standard fuel lines, and even the OEM Marelli TPS (Throttle Position Sensor) using a supplied custom adaptor, additionally the OEM throttle cable and servo pipe can be used.

For customers requiring an 8 injector set-up, we can supply Jenvey fuel rails at additional cost to run on the bodies themselves.

(NB Some photos have the standard fuel rail pictured, this is for illustration purposes only, and the fuel rail is not included as part of the kit.)

Window Film is required for rallycars using original glass side windows. Should the side-window be smashed, it aims to stop thousands of tiny fragments showering the competitors.

Regulation 3.11 of the new
FullDescription:
Grayston Window Film - GE120

Window Film is required for rallycars using original glass side windows. Should the side-window be smashed, it aims to stop thousands of tiny fragments showering the competitors.

Regulation 3.11 of the new MSUK National Competition Rules for Rally states:

"Side windows if of glass must be of laminated or toughened glass and if of toughened glass must be coated on the inside with a clear transparent safety film. The thickness of this film must not be greater than 100 microns."

 

This window film is designed to meet those requirements.

 

Supplied in a 4m x 51cm roll.

FullDescription:
AP Racing Formula DOT 5.1 Road/Competition Brake & Clutch Fluid.

Formula DOT 5.1 is a premium specification Motor Vehicle Brake and Clutch Fluid which conforms to and exceeds the current international specifications U.S. FMVSS No 116, DOT 3, DOT 4, and DOT 5.1, S.A.E. J1703, SAE J1704 and ISO4925.

Suitable for High Performance Road Applications including vehicles fitted with ABS and ESP.

Superior -40°C (-40°F) viscosity makes it suitable for vehicles operating in cold climates.

AP Racing Formula DOT 5.1 is non silicone based.

AP Racing Formula DOT 5.1 fluid will mix safely with other DOT 5.1 fluids along with DOT 3 and DOT 4 Fluids conforming to the above specifications.

FullDescription:

ShortDescription: Designed for the professional and semi-professional teams and drivers, which can be universally mounted for any Motorsport application. The lightweight handbrake is manufactured with CNC Machined Billet Aluminium Lever featuring CNC Machined Bille
FullDescription:
Designed for the professional and semi-professional teams and drivers, which can be universally mounted for any Motorsport application. The lightweight handbrake is manufactured with CNC Machined Billet Aluminium Lever featuring CNC Machined Billet Grips. These together are then bolted to a mild steel powdercoated cradle which has a 57mm Bolting hole pattern for a master cylinder to be mounted on the rear through a female PTFE Rose Joint that is bolted to the CNC machined Lever.

The Adjustment for this handbrake comes through the removable grips that can be bolted higher or lower the lever to meet your desired height. The shortest length is 320mm but can be adjusted to 380mm

Due to the clever function of how this handbrake is produced, it allows the flexibility of being able to mount the handbrake either Vertically OR Horizontally. To change the orientation, you simply just need to remove the M8 pivot bolt and turn the lever orientation before re-securing the pivot bolt.

The handbrakes can be used with the majority of master cylinders on the market which feature a 57mm mounting hole distance and a 5/16″ Threaded push rod.

The Mild Steel Cradle base also features mounting holes to easily install a bias valve if needed.

Product Information:

  • Vertical Pull Back or Horizontal Pull Up
  • Lockable
  • 320-380mm Adjustable Length
  • 1.1kg

Lever Type Brake Bias Valve with M10x1 Female Outlets.

Our specially selected range of products that work in unison with all of our obp Motorsport core hardware. Whether you are looking for master cylinders, bias adjusters o
FullDescription:
Lever Type Brake Bias Valve with M10x1 Female Outlets.

Our specially selected range of products that work in unison with all of our obp Motorsport core hardware. Whether you are looking for master cylinders, bias adjusters or replacement parts. obp Motorsport has you covered.

Where others are made from direct processed aluminium profiles, the obp bias valve uses Aluminium Alloy with extra material for precision machining. This not only results in higher precision and better appearance, it also provides a superior performance to others on the market.

What is a Bias Proportioning Valve?

A Bias Proportioning Valve (or more commonly known as a Bias Valve) is a small compact hydraulic component that enables you to adjust the brake pressure to a particular area.

The bias valve comes into action when operating at a high pressure and once adjusted to your desired position. For example, when left neutral the component works at a 1:1 ratio meaning the pressure entering and leaving the bias valve is equal. However, when you adjust the knobs on the bias valve, it allows you to control how much pressure exits the bias valve.

We have either a lever type or screw type bias valves available with either having their own benefits, the screw type bias valves allow you to finer tune the adjustment whereas the lever type is a 7 click adjustment.

Product Information:

  • Machined from T6061 Aluminium
  • Supports Pressure of 16MPA (2,175 PSI)
  • M10x1 Ports

ProductName: 1 Litre Base Mount Fuel Swirl Pot - JIC - Black
ShortDescription:
1L Base Mount Fuel Swirl Pot.

A fuel swirl pot is a must for any serious race car running fuel injected engines. The function of a swirl pot acts as a fuel reservoir to provide a constant supply of fuel to the engine un
FullDescription:
1L Base Mount Fuel Swirl Pot.

A fuel swirl pot is a must for any serious race car running fuel injected engines. The function of a swirl pot acts as a fuel reservoir to provide a constant supply of fuel to the engine under harsh conditions and brake forces, thus minimalising the risk of fuel pump or engine failure due to fuel starvation. It is installed in between the fuel tank and the engine and is connected through 2 fuel pumps, the first usually being a low pressure pump (can be a high pressure pump) from the fuel tank to the pot before using a high pressure pump from the swirl pot to the fuel rail.

With the obp Fuel Swirl pots, you will notice the inlets being positioned to the side of the tank rather than the middle – this helps create a swirling motion inside the tank. This helps cool the fuel down before being guided to the bottom of the tank with hot fuel staying at the top.

What is the difference between a Fuel Swirl Pot & a Fuel Surge Tank?
The difference between the Swirl pot and a Surge tank is based on where the fuel pumps are mounted. For example, a Fuel Swirl Pot works by using externally based in line fuel pumps whereas the Fuel Surge Tank works through internally based submerged fuel pumps with the benefit of pumping the fuel from source.

With obp’s extensive range, the is always an option available to suit your requirements.

• 1 to 2 Litres
• Base Mounted or Bulkhead Mounted
• Standard Raw Silver Finish or ‘Dark Matter’ Black Finish
• AN / JIC Fittings or Barbed Ribbed Fitting

What is the difference between a Fuel Swirl Pot & a Fuel Surge Tank?
The difference between the Swirl pot and a Surge tank is based on where the fuel pumps are mounted. For example, a Fuel Swirl Pot works by using externally based in line fuel pumps whereas the Fuel Surge Tank works through internally based submerged fuel pumps with the benefit of pumping the fuel from source.

With obp’s extensive range, the is always an option available to suit your requirements.

FullDescription:
0.5L Bulkhead Mount Baffled Oil Catch Tank (Round).

 

What is a Oil Catch Tank?


A catch tank is a small simple can that is fitted to the vehicles crankcase ventilation circuit. The purpose of the
catch can is to trap the oil vapours and other contaminants before re-entering the engine. These vapors, which are
produced during combustion, are usually rerouted back through the intake system before being caught ensuring
clean air goes into the engine resulting in stopping oil being dripped onto the race track!

The tank acts as a filter between the crankcase and intake manifold and an important part of the vehicle as it helps
prevent harm coming to your engine.

The catch tank is plumber into the vehicles PCV System to capture excess crankcase vapors and residual mist from
re-entering the intake track.

The Oil Catch tank will allow your engine to run more efficiently due to the separation of oil from the intake system.
When there is oil in the system the end results are reduced fuel octane, high chance of engine knocks, worse
emissions and high oil consumption.

With obp’s extensive range, the is always an option available to suit your requirements.

Our tanks vary from:
• 1 to 3 Litres
• Standard Raw Silver Finish or ‘Dark Matter’ Black Finish
• AN / JIC Fittings or Barbed Ribbed Fittings

Product Information
 

  • Bulkhead Fitment
  • Deflector Plate Baffle
  • 12mm Inlets
  • 12mm Breather
  • M10x1.25 Drain

FullDescription:
2L Bulkhead Mount Baffled Oil Catch Tank (Square).

PART NUMBER : OBPCT006

What is a Oil Catch Tank?
A catch tank is a small simple can that is fitted to the vehicles crankcase ventilation circuit. The purpose of the
catch can is to trap the oil vapours and other contaminants before re-entering the engine. These vapors, which are
produced during combustion, are usually rerouted back through the intake system before being caught ensuring
clean air goes into the engine resulting in stopping oil being dripped onto the race track!

The tank acts as a filter between the crankcase and intake manifold and an important part of the vehicle as it helps
prevent harm coming to your engine.

The catch tank is plumber into the vehicles PCV System to capture excess crankcase vapors and residual mist from
re-entering the intake track.

The Oil Catch tank will allow your engine to run more efficiently due to the separation of oil from the intake system.
When there is oil in the system the end results are reduced fuel octane, high chance of engine knocks, worse
emissions and high oil consumption.

With obp’s extensive range, the is always an option available to suit your requirements.

Our tanks vary from:
• 1 to 3 Litres
• Standard Raw Silver Finish or ‘Dark Matter’ Black Finish
• AN / JIC Fittings or Barbed Ribbed Fittings

Product Information

  • Bulkhead Fitment
  • 200x150x70mm Tank Only
  • Deflector Plate Baffle
  • 12mm Inlets
  • 12mm Breather
  • M10x1.25 Drain
  • Sight Tube

ShortDescription:
Brake and Clutch Master Cylinders — 0.625, 0.7, 0.75 Bore Sizes

The obp Motorsport range of Compact Master Cylinders is engineered to be the perfect space-saving solution for anyone working with limited room in the engine
FullDescription:
Brake and Clutch Master Cylinders — 0.625, 0.7, 0.75 Bore Sizes

The obp Motorsport range of Compact Master Cylinders is engineered to be the perfect space-saving solution for anyone working with limited room in the engine bay. Produced from forged aluminium, these lightweight designs offer a significant advantage over standard remote master cylinders with their extra-short internal chamber. That’s what makes our compact master cylinders ideal for amateur and professional motorsport, as well as other high-performance applications.

Whether you’re upgrading your braking system or fine-tuning your hydraulic systems, these compact master cylinders are designed to perform with precision and reliability for clutches and brakes (front and rear).

They’re also a versatile fit for applications in Automotive, Motorsport, Agriculture, and even Hydraulic systems.

Compact Master Cylinders Key Features

  • The compact design maximises space, making this part perfect for tight engine bays.
  • Lightweight construction (weighing just 200g), made from high-strength forged aluminium.
  • The Extra-Short Internal Chamber is optimised for reduced space without compromising performance.
  • The standard 2.25” (57mm) bolt-hole spacing shares the same mounting patterns as most master cylinders on the market, making it a direct fit for many setups.
  • The 60° Mounting Flange provides flexibility in installation angles for various applications.
  • Can be used with remote or attachable fluid reservoirs.

Thread Inlets and Outlets

  • 7/16”-20 UNF Inlet
  • 3/8”-24 UNF Outlet
  • Cut-Off Range – Between 0.7mm – 1.7mm, ensuring precise fluid control for enhanced braking performance.

Ideal for Automotive & Motorsport Applications

When it comes to performance vehicles, the right balance between brake and clutch systems is critical. For motorsport and automotive applications, we recommend the following setup for optimal performance:

  • 0.625” Bore for the front brakes
  • 0.7 Bore for the rear brakes
  • 0.75 Bore for the clutch

This configuration ensures the perfect fluid displacement based on the number of caliper pistons you’re running. For instance, if you’re using 6-pot calipers, you may require a 0.7” or 0.75” master cylinder to move enough brake fluid and deliver optimal braking performance.

Why Choose obp Motorsport?

At obp Motorsport, we’re committed to providing cutting-edge components that deliver both performance and durability. Our Compact Master Cylinders are trusted by professionals across the globe, thanks to our attention to detail, rigorous testing, and commitment to quality.

Upgrade your vehicle with confidence, whether you’re tackling high-speed turns on the track or fine-tuning your off-road setup, obp Motorsport Compact Master Cylinders have got you covered!

ShortDescription:
Brake and Clutch Master Cylinders — 0.625″, 0.7″, 0.75″, 0.812″, 0.875″ and 1-inch Bore Sizes

The space-saving, integral design of the obp master cylinder is a game-changer for bulkhead-fit pedal boxes, making it perfect for installations
FullDescription:
Brake and Clutch Master Cylinders — 0.625″, 0.7″, 0.75″, 0.812″, 0.875″ and 1-inch Bore Sizes

The space-saving, integral design of the obp master cylinder is a game-changer for bulkhead-fit pedal boxes, making it perfect for installations where the cylinder sits conveniently in the engine bay. With the built-in reservoir, you eliminate the need for extra brake lines required in a remote setup, ensuring a leak-free operation and a cleaner, more efficient system.

The obp Master Cylinder is designed for compatibility, with a 2.25” (57mm) bolt-hole spacing that matches most standard mounting patterns in the industry. This makes it an ideal choice for a wide variety of applications, including automotive, motorsport, agriculture, hydraulic systems, and more.

Integral Master Cylinders Key Features

  • Lightweight at just 350g
  • Vertical Mounting Flange for easy installation
  • 3/8”-24 UNF Outlet for reliable connections
  • Standard 84mm Push Rod Length
  • M8 Bolt Hole Size for universal mounting

Choosing the Right Master Cylinder Bore Size

When selecting the proper master cylinder size for automotive and motorsport applications, a general rule of thumb is:

  • 0.625-inch Bore for front brakes
  • 0.700-inch Bore for rear brakes
  • 0.750-inch Bore for the clutch
  • 0.812″, 0.875-inch or 1-inch

However, this may vary depending on the size of your brake calipers because some calipers require more brake fluid for optimal performance.

  • Inlet Fitting: 7/16-inch-20 UNF
  • Outlet Fitting: 3/8-inch-24 UNF
  • Push Rod Thread: 5/16-inch
  • Pushrod Length: 84mm
  • Bolt Hole Spacing: 1/4-inch

To add some context, the 3/8”-24 UNF outlet indicates that the outlet port of the master cylinder has a diameter of 3/8 inches, with 24 threads per inch, following the UNF threading standard. This ensures a strong, leak-resistant connection, which is critical in high-pressure applications like braking systems in racing vehicles.

Why Choose obp Motorsport?

When it comes to braking accessories, obp Master Cylinders have earned their reputation as one of the most sought-after options on the market. Featuring an innovative internal double-seal setup, these master cylinders are prized for their unbeatable combination of reliability, affordability, and top-tier performance.

Whether you’re pushing the limits on the racetrack or working in demanding industrial environments, obp Master Cylinders are designed to deliver outstanding results wherever high-quality components are essential.

The obp Master Cylinder is designed for compatibility, with a 2.25” (57mm) bolt-hole spacing that matches most standard mounting patterns in the industry. This makes it an ideal choice for a wide variety of applications, including automotive, motorsport, agriculture, hydraulic systems, and more.

Integral Master Cylinders Key Features

  • Lightweight at just 350g
  • Vertical Mounting Flange for easy installation
  • 3/8”-24 UNF Outlet for reliable connections
  • Standard 84mm Push Rod Length
  • M8 Bolt Hole Size for universal mounting

Choosing the Right Master Cylinder Bore Size

When selecting the proper master cylinder size for automotive and motorsport applications, a general rule of thumb is:

  • 0.625-inch Bore for front brakes
  • 0.700-inch Bore for rear brakes
  • 0.750-inch Bore for the clutch
  • 0.812″, 0.875-inch or 1-inch

However, this may vary depending on the size of your brake calipers because some calipers require more brake fluid for optimal performance.

  • Inlet Fitting: 7/16-inch-20 UNF
  • Outlet Fitting: 3/8-inch-24 UNF
  • Push Rod Thread: 5/16-inch
  • Pushrod Length: 84mm
  • Bolt Hole Spacing: 1/4-inch

To add some context, the 3/8”-24 UNF outlet indicates that the outlet port of the master cylinder has a diameter of 3/8 inches, with 24 threads per inch, following the UNF threading standard. This ensures a strong, leak-resistant connection, which is critical in high-pressure applications like braking systems in racing vehicles.

Why Choose obp Motorsport?

When it comes to braking accessories, obp Master Cylinders have earned their reputation as one of the most sought-after options on the market. Featuring an innovative internal double-seal setup, these master cylinders are prized for their unbeatable combination of reliability, affordability, and top-tier performance.

Whether you’re pushing the limits on the racetrack or working in demanding industrial environments, obp Master Cylinders are designed to deliver outstanding results wherever high-quality components are essential.

Why Choose a Remote Master Cylinder?

When space in the engine bay is tight, and you can’t fit a master cylinder with a built-in reservoir, remote master cylinders offer the perfect solution. They allow you to mount the brake reservoirs in an alternative location by running a brake reservoir feed hose to the cylinder, providing flexibility without sacrificing performance.

The 2.25-inch (57mm) bolt-hole spacing ensures compatibility with the majority of master cylinders on the market, making installation easy across various applications.

Whether you’re involved in automotive, motorsport, agriculture, or hydraulic systems, obp Remote Master Cylinders are designed to handle it all. From street cars to high-performance race cars, these units ensure top-level braking performance.

What Master Cylinder Size Do You Need?

For automotive and motorsport applications, choosing the right master cylinder size is essential for optimal performance. We typically recommend the following setup:

  • Front Brakes: 0.625-inch Bore
  • Rear Brakes: 0.7-inch Bore
  • Clutch: 0.75-inch Bore

However, this can vary based on the number of pistons in your calipers. For example, larger calipers may require a 0.7-inch or 0.75-inch bore to move enough fluid for maximum braking efficiency.

Can obp Remote Master Cylinders be used for ABS Systems?

No, our integral and remote master cylinders are designed as a single chamber structure which are incompatible with ABS Brakes. ABS Brake Master Cylinders require tandem dual chamber designs to provide a redundant brake circuits.

Product Overview

A brake fluid reservoir is an essential component that connects to your brake or clutch master cylinder, safely storing brake fluid while preventing contamination from dirt and moisture.

The OBP Motorsport reservoirs are manufactured from high-quality plastic with EPDM seals, ensuring compatibility with all standard brake fluids. Please note: not suitable for use with mineral oils.

Key Features:

Durable plastic construction for long-lasting performance

EPDM seals designed for compatibility with standard brake fluids

Two size options to suit your system requirements

Recommended remotely via a feed pipe

Lightweight, compact design – ideal for motorsport and performance cars

ProductName: Air Ducting Hose Single Layer Brown Silicone
ShortDescription:
Single Layer Brown Silicone Coated Ducting Hose

The obp single layer brown ducting hose is produced by a flexible, temperature resistant brown silicone which contains a steel spring wire spiralling throughout the pro
FullDescription:
Single Layer Brown Silicone Coated Ducting Hose

The obp single layer brown ducting hose is produced by a flexible, temperature resistant brown silicone which contains a steel spring wire spiralling throughout the product to help avoid kinks and maintaining air flow in the tight bends making the part perfect for braking ducts, cockpit ventilation and other low pressure applications.

What is the difference between Black Ducting and Brown Ducting?
One of the most common question we are asked if determining the difference between the ducting you can buy on the market. The most noticeable being some are black and some are brown.
Black Ducting is usually produced from a Neoprene and is suitable for temperatures ranging between -50° to +150°C. Our Brown Ducting is a silicone coated fibreglass fabric reinforced by a glass fibre cord which is suitable for temperatures ranging between -70° and +300°C. It also has a short time temperature resistance to +350°C

These hoses are sold per 1 metre lengths and can be supplied up to 4 metre continuous lengths.

ShortDescription:
M22 Male Oil Cooler Adapter – Precision-Engineered with Integrated O-Ring Groove

Our M22  oil cooler adapters are expertly engineered for high-performance applications, providing a secure and leak-free connection betwee
FullDescription:
M22 Male Oil Cooler Adapter – Precision-Engineered with Integrated O-Ring Groove

Our M22  oil cooler adapters are expertly engineered for high-performance applications, providing a secure and leak-free connection between M22 female oil cooler ports and AN hose fittings.

Each adapter is CNC-machined with a precisely sized O-ring groove, delivering optimal compression for a reliable seal. This design minimizes the risk of over-tightening, which can lead to O-ring failure — a common issue with many inferior M22 O-ring adapters on the market.

Designed specifically for use with oil coolers and components featuring a flat mating surface, these adapters are ideal for systems where the O-ring groove is required to be part of the fitting itself. While most M22 female fittings conform to this flat-seal design, we recommend verifying compatibility before purchase.

Compatible with M22 female-threaded oil coolers. Includes high-quality O-ring for easy installation.

FullDescription:
Suspension Front Top Mounts Suitable for BMW E31 – Camber Adjustable.

Fitting the obp Top Mounts allow you to upgrade your coilovers improving the strength with these having a more robust material for improved grip, turn stability and reduction in excess understeer/oversteer. These adjustable top mounts allow you to adjust the suspension camber to refine your performance on any given track. 

Machined from billet 6061 aluminium, these parts come as a pair with 6 x M8 Mounting bolts and is fitted with Carbon Steel PTFE Lined Spherical Bearings.

BMW E39
BMW E31

ShortDescription:
Alloy Dry Sump Tank – 1 to 3 Gallon Capacities
High-Performance Aluminium | Baffled | JIC Fittings | UK Made

The OBP Alloy Dry Sump Tank is a vital component in a dry sump oil sys
FullDescription:
Alloy Dry Sump Tank – 1 to 3 Gallon Capacities
High-Performance Aluminium | Baffled | JIC Fittings | UK Made

The OBP Alloy Dry Sump Tank is a vital component in a dry sump oil system, which is commonly used in motorsport and high-performance engines to maintain consistent oil pressure, especially under extreme conditions such as hard cornering, acceleration, and braking. Unlike traditional wet sump systems, a dry sump setup stores oil externally in a dedicated tank, eliminating the risk of oil starvation and improving overall engine reliability.

Our dry sump tanks are universally designed to suit a wide range of applications and are handmade in the UK using 2mm high-grade aluminium. Each tank includes an internal baffle system to reduce oil surge, a 50mm screw cap filler neck, and JIC male fittings for leak-free, high-flow connections. Every unit is pressure tested to ensure durability and dependable performance in even the harshest racing environments.

🔧 What Is a Dry Sump Tank Used For?

A dry sump tank stores and manages the engine’s oil outside the crankcase. It works as part of a dry sump lubrication system, allowing scavenger pumps to collect oil from the engine and deliver it back to the tank. This system prevents oil starvation during high-G manoeuvres, lowers engine height for a better centre of gravity, and allows for increased oil capacity, making it ideal for race, drift, rally, and high-performance road cars.

Key Features:

✅ Designed for Dry Sump Lubrication Systems – Essential for race and high-performance engines

✅ Internal Baffling – Prevents oil slosh and surge during aggressive driving

✅ 2mm Aluminium Construction – Lightweight yet strong, ideal for motorsport applications

✅ Leak-Free JIC Fittings – JIC 12 male inlet and outlet for secure, high-flow oil connections

✅ 50mm Screw Cap Filler Neck – Easy oil top-up and access

✅ Pressure Tested – Ensures leak-free reliability under race conditions

✅ Handmade in the UK – Expertly crafted by OBP Motorsport with rigorous quality control

ShortDescription:
V2 Alloy Dry Sump Tank – 1.5 & 2 Gallon Capacities
Advanced Cooling & Deaeration | Cylindrical Baffle Design | Motorsport Proven

The OBP V2 Alloy Dry Sump Tank represents the next
FullDescription:
V2 Alloy Dry Sump Tank – 1.5 & 2 Gallon Capacities
Advanced Cooling & Deaeration | Cylindrical Baffle Design | Motorsport Proven

The OBP V2 Alloy Dry Sump Tank represents the next generation of oil control technology for high-performance and motorsport applications. Developed in-house at our UK facility, this upgraded version of our original dry sump tank introduces key enhancements to cooling efficiency, oil deaeration, and flow dynamics—all designed to meet the demands of modern race engines.

Unlike traditional designs, the V2 dry sump tank features a side-mounted inlet that promotes a circular internal oil flow. Combined with a cylindrical multi-stage baffle system, this helps improve oil separation and maintain consistent oil pressure, even under aggressive cornering or acceleration.

?? What Is a Dry Sump Tank Used For?

A dry sump tank is a critical component in dry sump lubrication systems, commonly used in motorsport and high-performance vehicles. It stores oil externally, allowing for improved engine reliability, better oil control, and lower engine placement. The V2 tank takes this further by enhancing internal circulation and reducing air in the oil (deaeration), helping prevent oil starvation and maintaining peak engine performance.

Key Features:

? Improved Cooling & Deaeration – Cylindrical baffle design enhances oil circulation and air/oil separation

? Side M22x1.5 Female Inlet – Encourages circular flow pattern inside the tank for better deaeration

ProductName: V3 Alloy Splitable Dry Sump Tank
ShortDescription:
V3 Alloy Dry Sump Tank – 1.5 & 2 Gallon Capacities

Advanced Cooling & Deaeration | Serviceable Split Design | Motorsport-Ready

The OBP V3 Alloy Dry Sump Tank is the latest ev
FullDescription:
V3 Alloy Dry Sump Tank – 1.5 & 2 Gallon Capacities

Advanced Cooling & Deaeration | Serviceable Split Design | Motorsport-Ready

The OBP V3 Alloy Dry Sump Tank is the latest evolution in high-performance oil management, built for motorsport and serious performance applications. Designed and handcrafted in our UK facility, the V3 version builds on the proven performance of previous models with enhanced oil cooling, superior deaeration, and a new split-body design for easy cleaning and maintenance.

Crafted from 2mm aluminium and pressure tested for durability, this dry sump tank features a unique cylindrical internal baffle system and side-mounted inlet that promotes a swirling oil motion, aiding air/oil separation and consistent oil pressure during aggressive driving conditions.

?? What Is a Dry Sump Tank Used For?

In a dry sump lubrication system, oil is stored externally in a dedicated tank rather than the engine’s sump. This setup is ideal for race and performance vehicles because it improves oil control, reduces the risk of oil starvation, and allows for lower engine placement. The OBP V3 Dry Sump Tank goes further by optimising internal oil movement and air separation—keeping your engine reliably lubricated even under the most extreme conditions.

?? New: Split Design with Viton Gasket for Easy Servicing

The V3 Dry Sump Tank includes a split-body design that allows the tank to be taken apart for full internal access—making cleaning and maintenance simple. It’s sealed with a high-quality Viton gasket, providing excellent resistance to oil, fuel, and heat, ensuring a long-lasting and leak-proof seal.

Key Features:

? Race-Ready Construction – Designed for competitive motorsport use

? Improved Cooling & Deaeration – Cylindrical baffles and side inlet enhance internal oil circulation

? Split Design with Viton Gasket – Easy to clean and maintain

? Side M22x1.5 Female Inlet – Creates circular internal oil flow

? M22x1.5 Female Centre Outlet – Draws clean oil from the baffle’s calm zone

? Twin AN8 Female Breather Ports – Supports various breather configurations

? AN6 Drain Port (Plug Included) – For fast and clean oil draining

? Low-Profile 50mm Screw Cap – Compact and easy to access

? Base Mounted – Secure fitment with low centre of gravity

? Handmade in the UK – Built from 2mm aluminium and pressure tested before shipping

ProductName: Pro-Race V2 Floor Mounted Cockpit Fit 1 Pedal Bias Unit (Brake)
ShortDescription:
The Pro-Race V2 – The Original Pedal System. (Single Brake Pedal)

Part Number : OBP0040PRC

No room for master cylinders in your engine bay? The PRC V2 pedal boxes are a perfect solution to overcome the
FullDescription:
The Pro-Race V2 – The Original Pedal System. (Single Brake Pedal)

Part Number : OBP0040PRC

No room for master cylinders in your engine bay? The PRC V2 pedal boxes are a perfect solution to overcome the problem. By having the master cylinder mounting at the front of the pedal box and rear facing, this allows you to push the pedal box right up against the firewall/bulkhead without the need of the master cylinders to be in the engine bay. With the master cylinders at your feet, you can use a master cylinder aluminium cover plate to protect your ankles!

Our lightweight range dual brake master cylinder bias controlled pedal boxes have been designed to offer the driver the highest level of efficiency in this critical area. The CNC Machined Pedals, together with low friction and high-quality oil impregnated spherical bearings set new standards in pedal box design. The pedal pads are also CNC Machined Billet aluminium which can be adjusted in multiple positions to allow the driver to have different pedal ratio options and also comfort.

The base box frame has been developed out of fabricated Mild Steel to provide an improved robustness and strength which is designed to mount up against the bulkhead to provide further support. On the front of the frame, it has 2 x mounting points for your brake master cylinders (will fit the majority of master cylinders on the market). These mounting holes have been cleverly designed to allow the master cylinders to mount at an angle so the pipework does not interfere with your feet.

The pedals are secured to the pedal box by a stainless steel shaft that slots through each pedal.

Product Information:

  • Fitment: Cockpit Fit (Rear Facing Master Cylinders)
  • Pedal Ratio: 5.05:1 / 5.45:1
  • Weight: 1.8kg

The ergonomic machined pedals, together with low friction and high-quality oil impregnated spherical bearings set new standards in pedal box design. The accelerator pedal pad is able to be adjusted up and down and the the brake pad is able to be adjusted up, down, right and left allowing you to adjust the set up to your comfort and requirements.

This particular pedal box is designed to be floor mounted with rear facing cylinders allowing you to push the pedal box right up to the bulkhead and keep the master cylinders inside the cockpit in case of tight spacing in the engine bay.

The clever design of the accelerator pedal allows a throttle cable to be attached without any linkages as there is a small stub on the bottom which can be adapted to suit.

ProductName: Track-Pro V2 Floor Mount Cockpit Fit 3 Pedal System
ShortDescription:
The Track-Pro V2. The Most Versatile Pedal System.

Sliver Pedals – OBP0331

Black Pedals –  OBP0331-B

You will find that a majority of modern cars on the road have an angled
FullDescription:
The Track-Pro V2. The Most Versatile Pedal System.

Sliver Pedals – OBP0331

Black Pedals –  OBP0331-B

You will find that a majority of modern cars on the road have an angled floorpan. With the Track Pro V2’s angled cradle and the cylinders being cockpit fit, this allows you to install the pedal box against the angled floorpan with ease, making it one of the most effortless pedal installs on the market as it requires no cutting of the floor or the bulkhead.

No room for master cylinders in your engine bay? The PRC V2 pedal boxes are a perfect solution to overcome the problem. By having the master cylinder mounting at the front of the pedal box and rear facing, this allows you to push the pedal box right up against the firewall/bulkhead without the need of the master cylinders to be in the engine bay. With the master cylinders at your feet, you can use a master cylinder aluminium cover plate to protect your ankles!

Our lightweight range dual brake master cylinder bias controlled pedal boxes have been designed to offer the driver the highest level of efficiency in this critical area. The CNC Machined Pedals, together with low friction and high-quality oil impregnated spherical bearings set new standards in pedal box design. The pedal pads are also CNC Machined Billet aluminium which can be adjusted in multiple positions to allow the driver to have different pedal ratio options and also comfort.

The base box frame has been developed out of fabricated Mild Steel to provide an improved robustness and strength which is designed to mount up against the bulkhead to provide further support. On the front of the frame, it has 2 x mounting points for your brake master cylinders (will fit the majority of master cylinders on the market). These mounting holes have been cleverly designed to allow the master cylinders to mount at an angle so the pipework does not interfere with your feet.

The Accelerator Pedal is equipped with two throttle stops that can be adjusted to suit your pedal throw and also a sensitive return spring. On the rear of the pedal, it has the throttle cable linkage installed as standard although it is also Drive By Wire (DBW) Compatible. Simply remove the linkage and replace with a Linear Potentiometer.

The pedals are secured to the pedal box by a stainless steel shaft that slots through each pedal.

Product Information:

  • Fitment: Cockpit Fit (Rear Facing)
  • Floor Pan Fit
  • Pedal Ratio: 5.05:1 / 5.45:1
  • Weight: 3.6kg
  • Available with False Floor Cover Plate (Black or Silver)

FullDescription:

Our lightweight range dual brake master cylinder bias controlled pedal boxes have been designed to offer the driver the highest level of efficiency in this critical area. The Victory+ pedal box product range is our specifically chosen pedal boxes suited for the clubman level of motorsport.

The Kit Car Pedal box has been specifically designed to work in most space frame chassis kit cars with a bulkhead. The pedal box comes with a 25x25mm cut out in the rear of the box to accommodate the bottom rail that is usually found in the drivers foot well.

On the rear of the frame, it has 3 x mounting points for your brake master cylinders (will fit the majority of master cylinders on the market).

The Accelerator Pedal is a simply mild steel arm that allows entry of the cable to come through the top of the pedal box which is a common feature in kit cars. It does not have stops or a return spring as it utilizes the return spring on the throttle body.

FullDescription:

The Universal Servo Replacement Unit has been designed for the customers who wish to keep their existing pedal set up but want to be able to control the braking system through a bias system. By removing your servo and mounting this replacement box in your engine bay, you can connect the push rod to your current brake pedal which enables you to get a bias control system.

This motorsport pedal box part comes with a bias bar, allowing you to adjust the brake bias to suit your driving style or track conditions.

Designed to be suited for most master cylinder applications especially obp Motorsport branded cylinders.

The product has been produced from Mild Steel Reinforced to provide extra strength.

ShortDescription:
The Pro-Race V2 – The Original Pedal System. (Single Brake)

Part Number : OBP0040PRTC

No room for master cylinders in your engine bay? The PRTC V2 pedal boxes are a perfect solution to overcome the problem. By having t
FullDescription:
The Pro-Race V2 – The Original Pedal System. (Single Brake)

Part Number : OBP0040PRTC

No room for master cylinders in your engine bay? The PRTC V2 pedal boxes are a perfect solution to overcome the problem. By having the master cylinder mounting at the front of the pedal box and rear facing, this allows you to push the pedal box right up against the firewall/bulkhead without the need of the master cylinders to be in the engine bay.

Our lightweight range dual brake master cylinder bias controlled pedal boxes have been designed to offer the driver the highest level of efficiency in this critical area. The CNC Machined Pedals, together with low friction and high-quality oil impregnated spherical bearings set new standards in pedal box design. The pedal pads are also CNC Machined Billet aluminium which can be adjusted in multiple positions to allow the driver to have different pedal ratio options and also comfort.

The base box frame has been developed out of fabricated Mild Steel to provide an improved robustness and strength which is designed to mount up against the bulkhead to provide further support. On the front of the frame, it has 2 x mounting points for your brake master cylinders (will fit the majority of master cylinders on the market). These mounting holes have been cleverly designed to allow the master cylinders to mount at an angle so the pipework does not interfere with your feet.

The pedals are secured to the pedal box by a stainless steel shaft that slots through each pedal.

Product Information:

  • Fitment: Cockpit Fit (Rear Facing Master Cylinders)
  • Pedal Ratio: 5.05:1 / 5.45:1
  • Weight: 1.8kg
  • Bias Bar Included
